ns0:entry.ns0:title: AutoMQ/automq
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AutoMQ/automq
Language: java
AutoMQ is a diskless Kafka® on S3. 10x Cost-Effective. No Cross-AZ Traffic Cost. Autoscale in seconds. Single-digit ms latency. Multi-AZ Availability.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CodePhiliaX/Chat2DB
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CodePhiliaX/Chat2DB
Language: java
AI-driven database tool and SQL client, The hottest GUI client, supporting MySQL, Oracle, PostgreSQL, DB2, SQL Server, DB2, SQLite, H2, ClickHouse, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataDog/dd-trace-java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-java
Language: java
Datadog APM client for Java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LawnchairLauncher/lawnchair
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LawnchairLauncher/lawnchair
Language: java
No clever tagline needed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Snailclimb/JavaGuide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Snailclimb/JavaGuide
Language: java
Java 面试 & 后端通用面试指南，覆盖计算机基础、数据库、分布式、高并发、系统设计与 AI 应用开发

ns0:entry.ns0:title: StarRocks/starrocks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/StarRocks/starrocks
Language: java
The world's fastest open query engine for sub-second analytics both on and off the data lakehouse. With the flexibility to support nearly any scenario, StarRocks provides best-in-class performance for multi-dimensional analytics, real-time analytics, and ad-hoc queries. A Linux Foundation project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: antlr/antlr4
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/antlr/antlr4
Language: java
ANTLR (ANother Tool for Language Recognition) is a powerful parser generator for reading, processing, executing, or translating structured text or binary files.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/dolphinscheduler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/dolphinscheduler
Language: java
Apache DolphinScheduler is the modern data orchestration platform. Agile to create high performance workflow with low-code

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/gravitino
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/gravitino
Language: java
World's most powerful open data catalog for building a high-performance, geo-distributed and federated metadata lake.
